name: Hunan Blend
recipeIngredient: 6 Ripe purple plums, pitted and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken on the skin side in an ungreased non-stick skillet or chicken fryer until golden brown. Remove and discard the chicken fat.
2. Blot the chicken with paper towels, then return it to the pan, skin side up.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except for the liquid sugar substitute. Stir occasionally.
4. Cover and simmer over low heat until the chicken is tender (40-45 minutes).
5. Uncover and continue simmering until the sauce thickens.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the liquid sugar substitute.
7. Serve with 4 servings, which contain 7.3 g Fat, 346 mg Sodium, 159 mg Cholesterol, and 310 Calories per serving.
